impact: ~113 arg-bearing onclick handlers across the app templates carry Jinja-interpolated args (e.g. onclick="loadFitting({{ f.id }}, this)"). Migrating them requires a new dispatcher convention. Two designs to consider: (a) `data-click="fn" data-arg="..."` with the handler reading `this.dataset.arg` (1 arg only), (b) `data-click="fn" data-args='[1,2,3]'` JSON-blob convention (any arg shape, but verbose). Recommend (a) for the 80%+ single-arg case and inline data-* attrs for the rest. After contract is defined, the 7 stopProp+arg sites (fitting_saved.html, partials/fitting_search_results.html, partials/mining_ledger_corp.html) can also migrate via `data-click data-arg data-stop`.
resolution:
Defined the dispatcher arg-passing convention in static/js/actions.js header docs, and migrated viewLedger as a proof-of-concept covering both the single-arg single-call case and the stopProp+arg case.

**Convention (per-attr dataset, not JSON):**

- Single arg: `data-click="fn" data-foo="bar"`; handler reads `this.dataset.foo`.
- Multi arg: multiple `data-*` attrs (e.g. `data-type-id`, `data-type-name`, `data-slot-type`); handler reads `this.dataset.typeId`, etc.
- StopProp+arg: combine with `data-stop`.

Per-attr was chosen over a JSON blob (`data-args='[1,"foo"]'`) because Jinja-string quote-escaping inside JSON is fragile and per-attr is what HTML5 `dataset` is for.

**Proof-of-concept migration (3 sites, 2 templates):**

- `mining_ledger.html:227` — `window.viewLedger` reworked to read `this.dataset.charIds` (was a positional `charIdsCsv` arg).
- `partials/mining_ledger_corp.html:21` — "View Corp Ledger" button: `onclick="viewLedger('{{ csv }}')"` → `data-click="viewLedger" data-char-ids="{{ csv }}"`.
- `partials/mining_ledger_corp.html:45` — per-character "View" button: `onclick="event.stopPropagation(); viewLedger('{{ id }}')"` → `data-click="viewLedger" data-char-ids="{{ id }}" data-stop`.

The bulk sweep across ~113 arg-bearing onclick handlers + the remaining 6 stopProp+arg sites stays scoped to ISS-022 (per-template migration). This issue defined the contract and validated it works end-to-end on a representative pattern.

Commit: pending deploy.
title: CSP T-031 follow-up: define data-click-arg dispatcher contract
